osquery.name: t1543_002_systemd_svc
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '/etc/systemd/system/%' OR path LIKE '/usr/lib/systemd/system/%';
